repos_pt:

repos_en:
[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) - TypeScript Post page using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)

[snake](https://github.com/cao-ancap/snake) - TypeScript Snake: Seek food through your territory but avoid obstacles along the way. Game made in TypeScript

[7backupper](https://github.com/caiocampos/7backupper) - Python Utility to automate creation of compressed backup files
repos_es:
